subject: Young humanoid fighter in a green gi, dynamic close-up pose with spiky dark hair and a confident expression
description: A young fighter is depicted from roughly the waist up in a dynamic three-quarter pose, wearing a green gi. The figure has spiky dark hair and a confident, determined expression directed slightly off-frame. The background features bright yellow-orange energy bursts and light effects radiating outward, giving the card a high-energy atmosphere. The art occupies the top half of the card with rules text below. The composition is a close mid-shot emphasizing the figure's face and upper body.
foreground: young fighter in green gi, spiky dark hair, confident expression
background: radiant yellow-orange energy burst, bright light effects
